prompt: Create a workflow with a form trigger at /feedback that collects name, email, rating (dropdown: 1-5), and comments. Store each submission in a 'feedback' data table and return a thank-you HTML page.

checklist.item: Has a form trigger at the path /feedback
Form has a required name field
Form has a required email field
Form has a rating field implemented as a dropdown with options 1 through 5
Inserts submitted form data into a persistent table named 'feedback'
The feedback table stores name, email, rating, and comments from the submission
Returns an HTML page as the response after form submission
The returned HTML page contains a thank-you message
